title: tretorhiza biflora
intro: Tretorhiza biflora, also known as the Chinese foxglove or yellow foxglove, is a plant species that belongs to the Pedaliaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including the ability to lower blood pressure and treat cardiovascular diseases due to its diuretic and vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of Tretorhiza biflora include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and preventing blood clots. Tretorhiza biflora can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
